title: Zanzibari Grilled Wrap
description: A vegan wrap filled with the flavors of Zanzibar, featuring grilled vegetables and a side of spicy sauce.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the zucchini, bell peppers, and onions until tender and lightly charred.
Warm the wrap in a dry pan or in the oven.
Assemble the wrap by placing the grilled vegetables inside.
Drizzle with Zanzibari sauce and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of spicy sauce for added flavor.
